mapper.select: SELECT AVG(BOARD_REVIEW_RATING) FROM BOARD_REVIEW WHERE BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_REVIEW WHERE BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO board_review VALUES ( board_review_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardReviewMemberId}, #{boardReviewTmdbMovieId}, #{boardReviewTitle}, #{boardReviewContent}, #{boardReviewRating}, SYSDATE, 1, 0 )
select board_review_seq.currval from dual
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_REVIEW WHERE BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{movieId} AND BOARD_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_REVIEW

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO) FROM board_review br INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID WHERE br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS = 1 AND um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 AND um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select DISTINCT br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO, br.BOARD_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID, br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, br.BOARD_REVIEW_TITLE, br.BOARD_REVIEW_CONTENT, br.BOARD_REVIEW_RATING, br.BOARD_REVIEW_DATE, br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS, br.BOARD_REVIEW_VIEW_COUNT from board_review br INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID where br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS = 1 and um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 and um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO desc)b ) ) where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO) FROM board_review br INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO WHERE br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS = 1 AND um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 AND ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId}

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select DISTINCT br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO, br.BOARD_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID, br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, br.BOARD_REVIEW_TITLE, br.BOARD_REVIEW_CONTENT, br.BOARD_REVIEW_RATING, br.BOARD_REVIEW_DATE, br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS, br.BOARD_REVIEW_VIEW_COUNT from board_review br INNER JOIN userpick_movie um ON br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO where br.BOARD_REVIEW_STATUS = 1 and um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 and ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId} order by br.BOARD_REVIEW_NO desc)b ) ) where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review WHERE board_review_status = 1 AND board_review_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
select br.*, (select member_nickname from member where member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as board_review_member_nickname from board_review br where board_review_no = #{boardReviewNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_review SET board_review_view_count = board_review_view_count + 1 WHERE board_review_no = #{boardReviewNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review WHERE board_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT AVG(BOARD_REVIEW_RATING) FROM BOARD_REVIEW WHERE BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT BOARD_REVIEW_RATING as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM board_review WHERE board_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId} GROUP BY board_review_rating ORDER BY board_review_rating

select br.*, (select member_nickname from member where member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (select member_profile_img from member where member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg from board_review br where board_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{movieId} and board_review_status = 1 order by board_review_no desc

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT br.board_review_no as boardReviewNo, br.board_review_member_id as boardReviewMemberId, br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id as boardReviewTmdbMovieId, br.board_review_title as boardReviewTitle, br.board_review_content as boardReviewContent, br.board_review_rating as boardReviewRating, br.board_review_date as boardReviewDate, br.board_review_view_count as boardReviewViewCount, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, (SELECT userpick_movie_no FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as userpickMovieNo, (SELECT userpick_movie_title FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieTitle, (SELECT userpick_movie_poster_path FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as moviePosterPath, (SELECT userpick_movie_release_date FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieReleaseDate, (SELECT userpick_movie_runtime FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieRuntime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like bl WHERE bl.board_like_review_no = br.board_review_no) as likeCount FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY br.board_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND um.userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT br.board_review_no as boardReviewNo, br.board_review_member_id as boardReviewMemberId, br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id as boardReviewTmdbMovieId, br.board_review_title as boardReviewTitle, br.board_review_content as boardReviewContent, br.board_review_rating as boardReviewRating, br.board_review_date as boardReviewDate, br.board_review_view_count as boardReviewViewCount, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, (SELECT userpick_movie_no FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as userpickMovieNo, (SELECT userpick_movie_title FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieTitle, (SELECT userpick_movie_poster_path FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as moviePosterPath, (SELECT userpick_movie_release_date FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieReleaseDate, (SELECT userpick_movie_runtime FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieRuntime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like bl WHERE bl.board_like_review_no = br.board_review_no) as likeCount FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND um.userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY br.board_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM userpick_genre ug WHERE ug.userpick_genre_movie_no = ( SELECT userpick_movie_no FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AND ug.userpick_genre_id = #{genreId} )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum as rnum, b.* FROM ( (SELECT br.board_review_no as boardReviewNo, br.board_review_member_id as boardReviewMemberId, br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id as boardReviewTmdbMovieId, br.board_review_title as boardReviewTitle, br.board_review_content as boardReviewContent, br.board_review_rating as boardReviewRating, br.board_review_date as boardReviewDate, br.board_review_view_count as boardReviewViewCount, (SELECT member_nickname FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberNickname, (SELECT member_profile_img FROM member WHERE member_id = br.board_review_member_id) as memberProfileImg, (SELECT userpick_movie_no FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as userpickMovieNo, (SELECT userpick_movie_title FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieTitle, (SELECT userpick_movie_poster_path FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as moviePosterPath, (SELECT userpick_movie_release_date FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieReleaseDate, (SELECT userpick_movie_runtime FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1) as movieRuntime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like bl WHERE bl.board_like_review_no = br.board_review_no) as likeCount FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_member_id = #{memberId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM userpick_genre ug WHERE ug.userpick_genre_movie_no = ( SELECT userpick_movie_no FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AND ug.userpick_genre_id = #{genreId} ) ORDER BY br.board_review_no DESC)b ) ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME as genreName, COUNT(*) as count FROM userpick_genre ug WHERE ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO IN ( SELECT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID IN ( SELECT br.BOARD_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID FROM board_review br WHERE br.BOARD_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ) ) GROUP BY ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT board_review_rating as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM board_review WHERE board_review_member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY board_review_rating ORDER BY board_review_rating
